message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Addressed all review items, BLOCKING fixed, CI green">
Steve, thank you for the thorough review. I've addressed your feedback:

**BLOCKING #1 (Context headings in All view): FIXED**
- The "All" view now groups actions under `<h2>` context headings, each in an `<section>` with `aria-labelledby` for screen reader heading navigation.
- When filtering by a single context, headings are omitted (the pill already shows the context).
- Added CSS for `.next-actions__context-heading` (muted color, semibold, proper spacing).
- Added integration test: `all_view_groups_actions_under_context_headings` verifies `<h2>` and `aria-labelledby` are present.
- Added integration test: `filtered_view_does_not_show_context_headings` verifies headings are absent in filtered view.

**Minor #2 (Context select defaults to filtered context): FIXED**
- The `<select>` now has `selected` on the option matching the current filter context.
- Added integration test: `add_form_context_select_defaults_to_filtered_context`.

**Minor #3 (No confirmation on delete): ACKNOWLEDGED**
- Consistent with inbox behavior. I agree this should be tracked as a deferred item for the whole app. I'll add it to `docs/deferred-items.md` if the team agrees.

**Nice-to-have #4 (Checkbox icon discoverability): NOTED**
- Will monitor in usability testing.

**Nice-to-have #5 (Action counts on filter pills): NOTED**
- Can be deferred.

All changes committed, pushed, CI green (run 21965572410). 202 tests passing (57 unit + 145 integration) + 11 Playwright e2e.

Does this resolve your BLOCKING item?
</teammate-message>

content.text: Let me verify the fixes by reading the updated template and tests.
Now let me verify the CSS and the new tests.
All three fixes are verified. Let me send my approval.

input.content:
Steve Krug here. I've verified all the fixes:

**BLOCKING #1 (Context headings): RESOLVED**
- The "All" view now groups actions under `<h2>` headings inside `<section>` elements with `aria-labelledby`. Users can scan by context visually and navigate by heading with a screen reader. When filtering to a single context, headings are correctly omitted. Both test cases cover this. This fully resolves the acceptance criteria: "Default view shows all contexts with context headings."

**Minor #2 (Context select defaults): RESOLVED**
- The `<option>` now gets `selected` when it matches `selected_context`. Users adding actions while viewing a filtered context will get the right default. Correct fix, test covers it.

**Minor #3 (Delete confirmation): Agreed** -- track as deferred item.

All UX concerns addressed. The page now answers "what can I do right now?" quickly and clearly. The trunk test passes. Empty states guide. Copy is clean.

**CONSENSUS: APPROVED** from Steve Krug (UX).
input.summary: BLOCKING resolved, CONSENSUS APPROVED from Steve Krug

content.text:
My review is complete. All UX concerns have been resolved:

- **BLOCKING fixed**: The "All" view now properly groups actions under context headings (`<h2>` inside `<section>` with `aria-labelledby`), matching the acceptance criteria.
- **Minor fixed**: The context dropdown now defaults to the currently filtered context.
- **Minor deferred**: Delete confirmation will be tracked as a cross-cutting deferred item.

I've sent my **CONSENSUS: APPROVED** to both the Driver and team lead.
